summary:
Claim: The upper first molar has two major fossae and one minor fossa.  
Evidence: - Two distinct, deep fossae exist between the buccal and lingual cusps (mesial and distal). - A single minor fossa lies near the central groove, forming part of the tooth’s developmental pattern.  
Answer: C
